segments.text: IIT Madras just launched a degree in aeronautics and space technology and you don't require J mains or advance for
this. Subscribe full disclosure and I'll break this down for you. It is a 4-year bachelor of science in aeronautics and space technology entirely online.
Applications for the May 2026 qualifier are open now. Eligibility class 12 or equivalent. Here's what the program
actually covers. It starts with fundamentals and builds toward diploma level work, computational fluid dynamics, finite element methods, real
engineering tools used in actual aerospace firms. At the BS level, the capstone project is designing an aircraft or spacecraft. Top performers
may be considered for onampus programs or advanced degrees at IIT Madras itself. The link is in the pinned comment below.
